home.heroLead: Each piece is hand-textured and stone-set in Kaunas — slow studio practice, no two alike.
home.catLead: A working index of pieces currently held in the studio drawer. Some are unique, some are made to order.
home.atelierTitle: The hand that makes the stone speak.
home.atelierText: For twenty years Rima has cast and chased her own pieces — granulated surfaces, sapphires from the studio drawer, rose-gold bezels turned warm by hand.

atelier.title: A studio-store on Vilniaus g. 30,
atelier.lead: A small space to see the pieces in person, be fitted for a ring, and meet the maker. By appointment until the opening — write us to arrange a visit.

about.title: About me
about.p1: For me, working with metal is primarily about finding texture and shapes. And that quest happens all the time — observing the world, living my everyday life, or getting to know new people. Sometimes ideas come spontaneously and spill out in sketches. Others require long puzzles, almost mosaics — countless attempts that do not leave me until I feel the completeness of the work.
about.p2: While studying at Kaunas School of Applied Arts, I also discovered the technique I liked the most — filigree on a solid surface. However, I see it as a texture, as a small element of the work, only complementing, but by no means completing, the thought of the work.
about.p3: Some pieces I create for just one special occasion; others ask me to come back to them. Let's get in touch.
about.uniqueLine: Each piece is one of a kind.

cookieNotice.body: We use two strictly-necessary cookies — to remember your language and your dismiss of the atelier announcement. No analytics, no advertising.

privacy.title: Privacy & cookies
privacy.intro: This page describes how Rima Berg handles your personal data when you visit rimaberg.com, write to info@rimaberg.com, or visit the atelier in Kaunas.
privacy.section1Text: Only what is needed to answer you. When you write to info@rimaberg.com we receive your email address, your message and any attachments. When you visit the website, our server may briefly log your IP address and the time of your request for security purposes — these logs are kept for up to 30 days. We do not run analytics, advertising or tracking scripts.
privacy.section2Text: The site uses two strictly-necessary cookies. `rb-locale` remembers your language choice (EN or LT) for up to twelve months. `rb-atelier-banner` remembers that you dismissed the atelier announcement so we do not show it again for seven days. No analytics or advertising cookies are used. See the Cookies page for details.
privacy.section3Text: We process your data on two grounds under the GDPR: your consent (when you write to us or set your language) and our legitimate interest in replying to enquiries about pieces, custom orders and atelier visits.
privacy.section4Text: We keep enquiry emails for up to 24 months from the last reply, so we can follow up on commissions and orders. Server access logs are kept for up to 30 days. Cookies expire as described in the Cookies page.
privacy.section5Text: Your data is never sold or shared with third parties for marketing. Email is hosted with our mail provider strictly for correspondence. Maps and fonts on the website are loaded from Google — your browser may share a request with Google when these resources load.
privacy.section6Text: Under the GDPR you may at any time request access to your data, ask for it to be corrected or deleted, ask us to limit or stop processing it, withdraw a previously given consent, or receive your data in a portable format. Write to info@rimaberg.com — we reply within 30 days. If you are not satisfied, you may also lodge a complaint with the State Data Protection Inspectorate of Lithuania (VDAI), https://vdai.lrv.lt.

cookies.title: Cookies
cookies.intro: rimaberg.com uses two small cookies, only the ones we need to make the site work. No analytics, no advertising, no tracking.
cookies.localePurpose: Remembers your language choice (EN or LT).
cookies.bannerPurpose: Remembers that you dismissed the atelier announcement so it is not shown again for a week.
cookies.consentText: Both cookies are strictly necessary to provide functionality you asked for (your language, your dismiss action), so no extra consent is required under the GDPR. You can still delete them at any time in your browser settings.
cookies.manageText: Most browsers let you view and remove cookies in the settings menu. Quick links: Chrome, Firefox, Safari, Edge.
cookies.changesText: If we ever add new cookies — for example, analytics — we will update this page and ask for your consent first.

ringSize.title: Ring sizing guide
ringSize.lead: If you already know your size, use the chart below to find the equivalent in any standard. To measure at home, wrap a thin strip of paper around the base of your finger, mark where it overlaps, and divide that length by π (3.14) to get the inside diameter. Best done at the end of the day, when fingers are slightly larger.
ringSize.note: For wide bands (5 mm and up), consider going up half a size.

comingSoon.title: A space on Vilniaus g. 30
comingSoon.text: We're opening a studio-store in central Kaunas — a place to see the pieces in person and be fitted. Follow along for the opening date.
